highLegibilityFont.title: Script of Great Clarity
highLegibilityFont.desc: Employ a script of high clarity in place of the common device font

themeIsAmoled.title: Pitch Black Mode
themeIsAmoled.desc: Use a background of total ink when in night mode. May preserve thy glass.

themeIsVibrant.title: Lively Visage
themeIsVibrant.desc: Bring forth more color to the work.

useAccentColor.title: Chosen Hue
useAccentColor.desc: Employ a custom hue of thy liking

reducedMotion.title: Stilled Motion
reducedMotion.desc: Halt the moving spirits within the work
